channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 xtclovver/RKNHardering (1191 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: xtclovver

📝 Repository: xtclovver/RKNHardering

📄 Descrizione: Обнаружние VPN конфигураторов на пользовательских устройствах с дальнейшей целью защиты от обнаружения

⭐ Stelle: 1191

🍴 Forks: 53

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: rkn rknhardering vless vpn vpndetection vpndetector xray

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-06T21:46:23Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-05T04:52:08Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 sogonov/anubis (1122 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: sogonov

📝 Repository: sogonov/anubis

📄 Descrizione: Android app manager with VPN integration. Manages groups of apps by freezing/unfreezing them based on VPN connection state.

⭐ Stelle: 1122

🍴 Forks: 34

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-13T03:41:38Z

]]>

item.title: 📝 agents-io/PokeClaw (775 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: agents-io

📝 Repository: agents-io/PokeClaw

📄 Descrizione: PokeClaw (PocketClaw) — first on-device AI that controls your Android phone. Gemma 4, no cloud, no API key. Poke is short for Pocket.

⭐ Stelle: 775

🍴 Forks: 112

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-04T17:09:41Z

item.title: 📝 jegly/Box (293 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jegly

📝 Repository: jegly/Box

📄 Descrizione: Private on-device AI suite for Android. Fork of Google AI Edge Gallery with llama.cpp, whisper.cpp, stable-diffusion.cpp, GGUF import, voice chat, vision AI, on-device image generation, biometric lock, encrypted history, and NPU/TPU/GPU acceleration.

⭐ Stelle: 293

🍴 Forks: 16

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: ai-assistant android-ai-app artificial-intelligence box gguf google litert litert-llamacpp litert-lm llamacpp local-ai ondevice-ai v2v visionai

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-17T10:42:52Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-05T03:37:02Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 jegly/OfflineLLM (119 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jegly

📝 Repository: jegly/OfflineLLM

📄 Descrizione: A privacy-first Android chat app that runs large language models entirely on-device. No internet, no cloud, no tracking. Built with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and llama.cpp with optimized ARM NEON/SVE inference.

⭐ Stelle: 119

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android android-ai android-ai-app android-llm artificial-intelligence edge-ai gemma4 generative-ai llamacpp llm local-ai local-llm local-llm-android ml offlinellm on-device-ai private-ai-assistant private-local-ai qwen3-5

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-04T00:37:32Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-02T16:12:09Z
